ground_truth: The Federation Cup was named in honor of the International Tennis Federation (ITF), as it was launched to celebrate the ITF's 50th anniversary.
kv_predicted: 1963 International Tennis Federation (ITF)
mode_predicted: 1965 Federation Cup (tennis): The 1967 Federation Cup was the third edition of what is now known as the Fed Cup. The competition was known as the Federation Cup until 1995. Therefore, the Federation Cup in women's tennis is named after the Federation.
